title: Date Column Change (Resolved)
excerpt: This is really petty, but it catches me off guard anytime I am selecting a date as to what day of the week it is. Every calendar I use starts on Sunday and ends on Saturday in terms of the formatting, but the one in Mond…

posts.author: SharonM (Sharon)
posts.cookedHtml: This is really petty, but it catches me off guard anytime I am selecting a date as to what day of the week it is. Every calendar I use starts on Sunday and ends on Saturday in terms of the formatting, but the one in Monday starts on, well, Monday. And I ~get~ it, but it still bugs me.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Sharon!

If I am understanding your request correctly, the start of the week day can be customised via the admin settings:

Screen Shot 2023-06-16 at 3.02.07 pm1248×1100 103 KB

Do let me know if I’ve misunderstood!
